tasks.definition: Redesign the 3-step signup flow to reduce drop-off. Replace modal wizard with inline progressive form.
tasks.latest_update:
what are the tasks?.

Next Steps: continue to the next checkpoint.

tasks.definition: Reduce initial dashboard load time from 4s to under 1s by lazy-loading widgets and virtualizing the activity feed.
tasks.latest_update:
Widget lazy-loading merged. Activity feed virtualisation PR is open for review.

Next Steps: Merge virtualisation PR and validate load time in staging.

tasks.definition: Implement push notification support for iOS and Android. Covers permission flow, subscription management, and delivery.
tasks.latest_update:
Deployed to production. iOS and Android permission flows confirmed working.

Next Steps: Monitor delivery rates over the next 7 days.

tasks.definition: Integrate Stripe Checkout and Customer Portal. Handle subscription upgrades, downgrades, and cancellations.
tasks.latest_update:
Checkout flow working in test mode. Cancellation webhook handler still pending.

Next Steps: Implement cancellation handler and run full payment cycle test.
blockers: Waiting for Stripe test account credentials from finance

tasks.definition: Implement per-tenant rate limiting (token bucket). Add 429 responses with Retry-After headers.
tasks.latest_update: Not yet started. Scheduled to begin after Billing Integration is merged.

tasks.definition: Add dark/light theme toggle using CSS variables. Persist preference to user profile.
tasks.latest_update:
On hold — deprioritised in favour of billing work this sprint.

Next Steps: Revisit in next sprint planning.

tasks.definition: Allow users to export their data in CSV and JSON formats from the account settings page.
tasks.latest_update:
CSV export complete. JSON export in review. Awaiting sign-off before deploy.

Next Steps: Get approval and schedule deploy for next sprint.

tasks.definition: Build a read-only audit trail UI showing who did what and when, filterable by user and action type.
tasks.latest_update:
Blocked by Data schema sign-off pending from platform team and timeline is at risk.

Next Steps: unblock dependency and confirm revised checkpoint.
blockers: Data schema sign-off pending from platform team
